import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn byte_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int, _ default: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    default
  end
end

fn get_or(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  let sn = sorted.len()
  mut j = 0
  while j < sn
    let v = get_or(sorted, j)
    if not inserted and x <= v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    j = j + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let total = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut has = false
mut neg = false
mut i = 0
while i <= total
  let b = if i < total
    byte_or(input, i, 32)
  else
    32
  end
  if is_digit(b)
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has = true
  else if b == 45 and not has
    neg = true
  else if is_ws(b)
    if has
      let val = if neg
        0 - cur
      else
        cur
      end
      if not list.contains(nums, val)
        nums = list.push(nums, val)
      end
      cur = 0
      has = false
    end
    neg = false
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
let nn = nums.len()
mut k = 0
while k < nn
  let v = get_or(nums, k)
  sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
  k = k + 1
end

mut out = ""
let sz = sorted.len()
mut m = 0
while m < sz
  let v = get_or(sorted, m)
  if m == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  m = m + 1
end
println(out)
